programs.title: Seinfeld
programs.desc: When Jerry is booked to appear on "The Tonight Show With Jay Leno," he takes George with him to Los Angeles to search for Kramer -- who vanished in a huff months earlier only to pop up inexplicably on TV in an episode of "Murphy Brown." George and Jerry are unaware that their wayward friend is in trouble as a victim of mistaken identity. Meanwhile, George bothers every celebrity he encounters.

programs.title: Seinfeld
programs.desc: While searching for Kramer in Los Angeles, Jerry and George are picked up for questioning by the police, who suspect Kramer is a notorious serial killer known as the smog stranger.

programs.title: Seinfeld
programs.desc: A stand-up comedian and his three offbeat friends weather the pitfalls and payoffs of life in New York City in the '90s.
